title: Umendo Wamafa Kwiiphondo zoMzantsi Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.title: Umendo Wamafa Kwiiphondo zoMzantsi Afrika
slides.lead: Masihambe sicande kuwo onke amaphondo alithoba size sifumane iindawo ezikhethekileyo, amabali kunye nezithethe eziyinxalenye yethu sonke.

media.alt: Umzobo omile onemibala womhlaba woMzantsi Afrika onamachaphaza aphawula iindawo zamafa kulo lonke ilizwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Wamkela abafundi uze uchaze umqondo 'womendo wamafa' - uhambo olucingelwayo olumisa kwiindawo ezikhethekileyo kuwo wonke uMzantsi Afrika. Buza: ukhona owakhe watyelela imyuziyam, isakhiwo esidala, isikhumbuzo okanye indawo yendalo? Umendo wamafa udibanisa ezi ndawo ndawonye. Ekupheleni kwesifundo abafundi kufuneka bakwazi ukubiza iindawo zamafa kumaphondo ahlukeneyo bakwazi nokuchaza ukuba kutheni sizikhusela.

slides.title: Ayintoni amafa?
slides.lead: Amafa yiyo yonke into esiyifumana kwixesha elidlulileyo esifuna ukuyigcinela ikamva.

blocks.text: **Amafa** zizinto esizifumana kubantu ababephila phambi kwethu. Zinokuba zizinto esinokuzibamba, njengezakhiwo ezindala nezixhobo, kunye nezinto esingenako ukuzibamba, njengeengoma, amabali, iilwimi kunye neendlela zokupheka. Amafa asinceda sazi ukuba singoobani nokuba sivela phi.

items: **Amafa endalo** - iintaba ezikhethekileyo, imiqolomba, imilambo nezilwanyana.
**Amafa enkcubeko** - izakhiwo, izikhumbuzo, ubugcisa nezinto ezindala.
**Amafa aphilayo** - iilwimi, umculo, imidaniso, ukutya nemibhiyozo.

media.alt: Imizobo emithathu elula: intaba, isakhiwo esidala nesigubu, ebonisa iindidi ezintathu zamafa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nika imizekelo ecacileyo yohlobo ngalunye ukuze abafundi beBanga 5 bakwazi ukuyibona: indalo (iTable Mountain), inkcubeko (i-Union Buildings), aphilayo (ukucula i-isicathamiya, i-braai yosapho, ukubalisa amabali). Gxininisa ukuba amafa aphilayo aphila ebantwini, hayi esakhiweni. Mema abafundi ukuba babize ilifa elinye elivela kusapho lwabo.

slides.title: IiNdawo Zamafa eHlabathi zoMzantsi Afrika
slides.lead: Ezinye zeendawo zethu zikhethekile kangangokuba ihlabathi lonke linceda ekuzigcineni.

blocks.text: **INdawo Yamafa eHlabathi** yindawo ekhethwe ngumbutho obizwa ngokuba yi-**UNESCO** kuba ibalulekile kubo bonke abantu emhlabeni, hayi kwilizwe elinye kuphela. UMzantsi Afrika unazo malunga **nalishumi** ezi ndawo, ezisasazeke kuwo onke amaphondo. Kumendo wethu siza kutyelela ezinye zazo.

items: Ezinye zikhethwe ngenxa yendalo, njengeentaba zaseKapa kunye neDrakensberg.
Ezinye zikhethwe ngenxa yembali, njengeMapungubwe neRobben Island.
Ukuba kolu luhlu kuthetha ukuba le ndawo ikhuselelwe abantwana bexesha elizayo.

media.alt: Ibheji esingqamileyo enomhlaba ngaphakathi, njengophawu lwamafa ehlabathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina inkcazo ilula: i-UNESCO liqela elikwiZizwe eziManyeneyo (United Nations) elenza uluhlu olukhethekileyo lweendawo ezibaluleke kakhulu ehlabathini. Akufuneki abafundi bafunde ngentloko inani elichanekileyo - eyona nto ibalulekileyo kukuba uMzantsi Afrika utyebile ngeendawo ezinjalo. [SME] Nceda uqinisekise inani langoku leeNdawo Zamafa eHlabathi ze-UNESCO zoMzantsi Afrika (yayilishumi ngo-2023) phambi kokuba isifundo siqale.

slides.title: Isitopu esinye samafa kwiphondo ngalinye
slides.lead: Amaphondo alithoba, iindawo ezidumileyo ezilithoba zokutyelela kumendo wethu.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - imiqolomba eneentsalela zabantu zamandulo kakhulu.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - ubukumkani bokuqala boMzantsi Afrika kunye nomkhombe wegolide.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - intolongo apho uNelson Mandela wayebanjelwe khona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Iintaba zeDrakensberg - amawaka emizobo yamatye yabantu bakwaSan.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu neMthatha - iindawo zobuntwana bukaNelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Amafa abantu bakwaSan kunye nemikrolo emidala ematyeni kumaKaru omileyo.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Iilali zamaSuthu kunye neVredefort Dome ekufuphi.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, apho kwafunyanwa khona ukhakhayi lomntwana wamandulo.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Iintaba iMakhonjwa zaseBarberton - ezinye zamatye amadala kunawo onke emhlabeni.

slides.notes: Le yislayidi songqinelo. Funda iphondo ngalinye kunye nesitopu saso ngokuvakalayo, uze ukhombe apho phantse likhoyo kwimephu ecingelwayo (okanye imephu esemthini ukuba unayo). Xelela abafundi ukuba iislayidi ezilandelayo ziza kusondeza ezinye zezi. Unokubuza umfundi ngamnye ukuba akhethe isitopu afuna ukusityelela kunako konke aze achaze ukuba kutheni. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuba ukudityaniswa kwephondo nendawo kufanelekile kwiklasi yakho; iphondo ngalinye lineendawo zamafa ezininzi kwaye ootitshala banokukhetha imizekelo yasekhaya.

slides.title: I-Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Iqela lemiqolomba ekufuphi neRhawutini apho izazinzulu zafumana khona ezinye zeentsalela zosapho lwabantu ezindala kunazo zonke ehlabathini.

blocks.text: Kwimiqolomba i-**Sterkfontein Caves** izazinzulu zigrumbe **iintsalela** - amathambo aguqulwe aba ngamatye - abantu bamandulo ababephila kwiminyaka yezigidi eyadlulayo. Ezidumileyo eziko zibandakanya ukhakhayi olubizwa ngokuba 'nguMrs Ples' kunye nesikhumba esiphantse sipheleleyo esibizwa ngokuba 'yiLittle Foot'. Yiyo loo nto le ndawo ibizwa ngokuba yi-*Cradle of Humankind*.

items: Umbombho yindawo apho kulala usana - ngoko oku kunjengendawo yokuzalwa yabantu.
YiNdawo Yamafa eHlabathi kuba ibalisa ibali labo bonke abantu.
Usenako ukutyelela imiqolomba nemyuziyam namhlanje.

media.alt: Imbonakalo yangaphakathi yomqolomba ophantsi komhlaba onokhakhayi lwentsalela ngaphakathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza 'intsalela' ngokucacileyo: amathambo aguquka kancinci aba ngamatye kwixesha elide kakhulu. ILittle Foot noMrs Ples benza inzululwazi ivakale ingokwenene kubafundi. Gcina umbono wexesha elide ngokuthambileyo - 'kudala kudala, ixesha elide kunokuba singaqonda.' Buyela kwikhadi leslayidi 5. [SME] Iminyaka yenziwe ilula ngabom; qinisekisa naliphi na inani atitshala akhetha ukulifundela ngokuvakalayo.

slides.title: Ubukumkani baseMapungubwe
slides.lead: Kudala, phezu kwenduli ephezulu emile mgama emantla, kwakumi isixeko esikhulu sobukumkani bokuqala boMzantsi Afrika.

blocks.text: Malunga neminyaka engama-700 ukuya kwengama-800 eyadlulayo, i-**Mapungubwe** yayibubukumkani obuxakekileyo apho abantu babelima, begcina iinkomo, berhweba ngegolide nangamazinyo eendlovu namazwe akude. Ukumkani wayehlala phezu kwenduli ekhethekileyo. Izazi zezinto zamandulo kamva zafumana izinto ezintle zegolide apho, kubandakanya **umkhombe wegolide** omncinci.

items: Ibonisa ukuba obukumkani obukhulu base-Afrika babukho apha kudala phambi kokufika kwabelungu.
Umkhombe wegolide ngoku uluphawu oludumileyo lwembali yoMzantsi Afrika.
IMapungubwe yiNdawo Yamafa eHlabathi kumda oneZimbabwe neBotswana.

media.alt: Induli emile phezulu enomkhombe omncinci wegolide phambi kwayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le slayidi ilungisa intsomi eqhelekileyo ngokubonisa ubukumkani base-Afrika obunamandla nobutyebi obabuphumelela kudala phambi kwamaxesha obukoloniyali. Gxininisa urhwebo (igolide namazinyo eendlovu behamba mgama ngolwandle) kunye nomkhombe wegolide njengobuncwane. Abafundi beBanga 6 baza kufunda ngeMapungubwe ngokunzulu kamva, ngoko utyala imbewu. Gcina imihla iqingqiwe ('malunga neminyaka engama-700-800 eyadlulayo').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Isiqithi esincinci elwandle ekufuphi neKapa esaba yintolongo edumileyo - kwaye saluphawu lwenkululeko.

blocks.text: Iminyaka emininzi i-**Robben Island** yayiyintolongo. Ngexesha localucalulo (i-apartheid), iinkokeli ezazilwela amalungelo alinganayo zazivalelwe apha, kude kwiintsapho zazo. **UNelson Mandela** wachitha iminyaka emininzi kwiseli encinci kwesi siqithi phambi kokuba akhululwe kwaza kamva waba ngumongameli wokuqala okhethwe ngokwentando yesininzi eMzantsi Afrika.

items: Namhlanje yimyuziyam efundisa abatyeleli malunga nomzabalazo wenkululeko.
Abanye babakhaphi ngamabanjwa angaphambili abelana ngamabali abo.
Isikhumbuza ukuba sixabise inkululeko namalungelo esinawo namhlanje.

media.alt: Isiqithi esincinci esinesibane sokukhanyisela elwandle, neTable Mountain kwimbonakalo yomgama.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha ucalucalulo ngobunono nangokulula kubafundi beBanga 5: abanye abantu babephathwa gadalala ngenxa yombala wolusu lwabo, kwaye abantu abanesibindi basebenza ukutshintsha oko. Beka iRobben Island njengendawo yosizi nethemba. Dibanisa noSuku Lwenkululeko / uNelson Mandela ukuba abafundi bayamazi. Kuphephe iinkcukacha ezimasikizi; gxila esibindini nakuxabiso lwenkululeko.

slides.title: Ubugcisa Bamatye baseDrakensberg
slides.lead: Phezulu kwiintaba zeDrakensberg kukho amawaka emizobo eyenziwa ngabantu bakwaSan kudala.

blocks.text: I-**uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** ludidi lweentaba oluphakame kunazo zonke eMzantsi Afrika. Imiqolomba nezikhuselo zamatye zayo ziqulethe amawaka **emizobo yasematyeni** eyenziwa ngabazingeli-baqokeleli **bakwaSan**. Bazoba abantu, iimpofu (i-eland), kunye neenkolelo zabo besebenzisa amabala endalo avela ematyeni, kwizityalo nakwizilwanyana.

items: Igama elithi uKhahlamba lithetha 'udonga lwemikhonto' ngesiZulu.
Imizobo ineminyaka engamakhulu, kwanamawaka ubudala.
YiNdawo Yamafa eHlabathi ngenxa yendalo yayo kunye nobugcisa bayo bamandulo.

media.alt: Udonga lomqolomba olunemizobo yamatye yakwaSan yempofu (i-eland) nomntu obalekayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yazisa abantu bakwaSan njengabantu bokuqala boMzantsi Afrika neengcaphephe zobugcisa nababalisi bamabali. Chaza ukuba ipeyinti yayenziwa njani ngezinto zendalo (i-ochre, amalahle, isabu sezityalo, amafutha ezilwanyana). Impofu (i-eland) yayisisilwanyana esibaluleke kakhulu kwiinkolelo zakwaSan. Phatha amafa akwaSan ngentlonipho - le mizobo ingcwele kubantu bosapho lwabo. Dibanisa nemikrolo yamatye yaseNorthern Cape kwislayidi esilandelayo.

slides.title: Ukucanda amaKaru kunye neFree State
slides.lead: Ezinye izitopu ezintathu kumendo wethu - eEastern Cape, eNorthern Cape naseFree State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Iinduli eziluhlaza apho wakhulela khona uNelson Mandela. Imyuziyam eMthatha ibalisa ibali lobomi bakhe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Induli egqunywe yimikrolo yamatye yamandulo, egcinwa ngabantu bakwaSan nabakwaKhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - iLali yamaSuthu
blocks.text: Imyuziyam ephilayo apho ungabona khona izindlu zesintu zamaSuthu ezineendonga ezizotywe ngobuhle.

media.alt: Imiboniso emithathu emincinci: iinduli ezigoqoyo, ilitye elikroliweyo, kunye nendlu engqukuva ezotyiweyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ezi zitopu zintathu zandisa umendo ukuya kumaphondo amaninzi neentlobo ezininzi zamafa: indawo yokuzalwa yomntu (Eastern Cape), ubugcisa bamandulo (imikrolo yaseNorthern Cape, ekroliweyo ematyeni endaweni yokuzotywa phezu kwayo), namafa aphilayo kwilali esebenzayo (Free State). Zoba umahluko phakathi kwemizobo yamatye (KZN) nemikrolo yamatye (Northern Cape). [SME] Faka endaweni yazo iindawo zasekhaya zaseEastern Cape okanye eFree State ukuba zibafanele ngcono abafundi bakho.

slides.title: Amatye amandulo nomntwana wamandulo
slides.lead: Ezethu izitopu zamaphondo ezimbini zokugqibela ziya eNorth West naseMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ngo-1924 ukhakhayi lwentsalela lomntwana wamandulo, 'uMntwana waseTaung', lwafunyanwa apha. Lwanceda ihlabathi ukuba lifunde ukuba abantu baqala e-Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Iintaba iMakhonjwa ziqulethe ezinye zamatye amadala kunawo onke emhlabeni - malunga neminyaka eyizigidi ezingama-3 500 ubudala - ngoku yiNdawo Yamafa eHlabathi.

blocks.heading: Ithuba - Gauteng
blocks.text: IFreedom Park neConstitution Hill emantla zikhumbula umzabalazo wamalungelo oluntu nentando yesininzi.

media.alt: Ukhakhayi oluncinci lwentsalela ecaleni kweentaba zamandulo ezinemaleko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: ITaung ibuyela kumxholo we-Cradle of Humankind - uMzantsi Afrika uphakathi kwibali lemvelaphi yabantu. IBarberton ibonisa amafa endalo ohlobo olwahlukileyo: amatye amadala ngokungummangaliso. Ikhadi lethuba likuvumela ukuba ukhankanye iindawo zentando yesininzi zaseGauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Qinisekisa unyaka wokufunyanwa koMntwana waseTaung (1924) nobudala obuqingqiweyo bamatye (malunga neminyaka eyizigidi ezingama-3 500) ukuba uyawacaphula ngokuvakalayo.

slides.title: Amafa aphilayo noSuku Lwamafa
slides.lead: Awonke amafa ahlala emile emyuziyam - amanye awo aphila kwizinto esizenzayo yonke imihla.

blocks.text: **Amafa aphilayo** adluliselwa ukusuka koomakhulu nootatomkhulu ukuya kubazali ukuya kubantwana. Aquka **iilwimi zethu ezisemthethweni ezili-11**, iingoma nemidaniso yethu, amabali ethu, iimpahla zethu kunye nokutya kwethu esikuthandayo. Minyaka le ngomhla wama-**24 kaSeptemba** uMzantsi Afrika ubhiyozela **uSuku Lwamafa**, xa sihlonipha zonke iinkcubeko zethu ezahlukeneyo.

items: Umculo nemidaniso efana ne-isicathamiya, umdaniso wamagumboots ne-amapiano.
Ukutya okufana nepapa, ibunny chow, iikoeksister, umngqusho ne-chakalaka.
Amabali, izibongo neemidlalo eyabelwanwa phakathi kweentsapho.

media.alt: Amanqaku omculo, isigubu nepleyiti yokutya emele amafa aphilayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza le slayidi ibe yeyona inentsebenziswano. Cela abafundi babelane ngengoma, ukutya okanye ibali elivela ekhaya labo. Gxininisa ukuba amafa aphilayo ngawabo bonke kwaye ayaqhubeka etshintsha - i-amapiano ngamafa amatsha enziwa ngoku kanye. Chaza uSuku Lwamafa ngokulula: iholide karhulumente yokubhiyozela zonke iinkcubeko zethu kunye. Qinisa intlonipho kumahluko.

slides.title: Ukukhathalela amafa ethu
slides.lead: Amafa ngawethu sonke, ngoko ke sonke kufuneka sincede ukuwakhusela.

blocks.text: Ukuba izakhiwo ezindala ziyawa, imizobo yamatye iyakrolwa, okanye amabali akaze abaliswe kwakhona, loo mafa alahleka ngonaphakade. Yiyo loo nto sinee**myuziyam**, **izikhumbuzo** kunye nemithetho ekhusela iindawo ezikhethekileyo. Kodwa abantu abaqhelekileyo nabo bayanceda - ngokutyelela, ukufunda nokudlulisela oko bakwaziyo.

items: Ungaze uchukumise okanye wonakalise ubugcisa bamatye okanye izinto ezindala.
Tyelela iimyuziyam neendawo zamafa ukuze ufunde amabali azo.
Mamela abadala uze udlulisele amabali abo kwabanye.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbini ezibambe ngobunono isakhiwo esincinci nomthi, zibonisa ukukhathalela amafa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Zisa isifundo kwi-'ngoko kutheni' yaso - amafa athambekele ekonakaleni kwaye anokulahleka. Dibanisa la macebiso mathathu nokuziphatha kwenene kuhambo lwesikolo. Qinisa intlonipho kwiindawo ezingcwele ezifana nobugcisa bamatye bakwaSan. Ungabuza abafundi ukuba babize into enye abaza kuyenza ukukhusela amafa. Oku kulungiselela imibuzo yophononongo.

slides.title: Esikufundileyo emendweni
slides.lead: Sicande kuwo onke amaphondo alithoba saza sadibana namafa endalo, awenkcubeko nawaphilayo.

blocks.text: Ukusuka kwimiqolomba ye-**Cradle of Humankind** ukuya kubukumkani base-**Mapungubwe**, intolongo yase-**Robben Island** neentaba ezizotyiweyo zase-**Drakensberg**, amafa oMzantsi Afrika abalisa ibali labo bonke abantu balo. Amafa ngawabo bonke, kwaye wonke umntu unokunceda ukuwakhusela.

blocks.question: Biza iindawo zamafa ezintathu ezahlukeneyo uze uchaze ukuba nganye ikweliphi iphondo.
Chaza umahluko phakathi kwamafa endalo, amafa enkcubeko namafa aphilayo. Nika umzekelo omnye ngamnye.
Kutheni kubalulekile ukukhathalela amafa ethu? Nika izizathu ezibini.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le mibuzo mithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 uvavanya ukukhumbula iindawo namaphondo; umbuzo 2 uvavanya umqondo ophambili weentlobo ezintathu zamafa; umbuzo 3 uvavanya ukuqonda ukuba kutheni amafa ebalulekile. Ukwabiwa kwamanqaku kulandela isimbo seSigaba esiPhakathi se-CAPS. Vala ngokukhumbuza abafundi ukuba nabo bayinxalenye yamafa aphilayo oMzantsi Afrika.
